{"society_power": 4.0, "state_power": 6.0, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": 1.5, "key_event": "CCP victory in civil war; founding of PRC (1949)", "reasoning": "The GMD \"Paper Leviathan\" collapsed but was replaced by a genuinely capacious, penetrating CCP party-state, sharply raising state power by decade's end; society was mobilized in huge numbers yet increasingly channeled under party control, eroding autonomous countervailing power even as older gentry intermediaries were destroyed."}
